name: Meilisearch Indexer
description: Indexes every persisted message into Meilisearch for global search. Configure meilisearchUrl to match the host MEILISEARCH_URL.
author: OpenWA

meilisearchUrl.title: Meilisearch URL
meilisearchUrl.description: Must match the host's MEILISEARCH_URL. The indexer and the query API must point at the same instance. Use https:// for allowConfigHosts to admit the host automatically; an http:// URL must also be added to net.allow.
